---
title: "Emily Peters"
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: IMG_4552_Original.png
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: rounded # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/petersemily/petersemily.github.io
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: Emily_Peters_resume_2-24.pdf
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:emp21@geneseo.edu

---


Emily Peters majors in Data Analytics and minors in Mathematics at SUNY Geneseo. When not at school, she enjoys spending time outside with her dog or working on a puzzle.

## Education

Genesee Community College | Batavia, NY
Major in Economic Crime Investigation | August 2021 - December 2022

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Data Analytics | Jan 2023 - present <br>
Minor in Mathematics
